correction_1_spline.boundary_knots: outermost knots (q0.10, q0.90) are the boundary; natural constraints force zero 2nd/3rd derivative beyond them; training min/max recorded as the valid domain
correction_1_spline.constant_column_removal: training-fold only (<=1 unique training value dropped)
correction_1_spline.degenerate_knots: <3 distinct knots -> single linear column (linear tails trivially hold)
correction_1_spline.deterministic_column_order: lexicographic by source column; RCS bases appended [linear, then restricted-cubic terms for interior knots ascending]
correction_1_spline.knots: training-fold quantiles [0.10, 0.35, 0.65, 0.90], de-duplicated ascending; NO test-fold knot estimation
correction_1_spline.supersedes: manifest spline_gam_spec (which described linear + truncated-cubic terms but mislabeled it natural)
correction_1_spline.tests: tests/test_restricted_cubic_spline.py (linear tails 2nd-difference=0; cubic interior; replay byte-identical; training-only + deterministic knots; degenerate fallback)

correction_2_beta_calibration.coefficient_constraints: UNCONSTRAINED (no non-negativity enforced by plain LogisticRegression)
correction_2_beta_calibration.deterministic_failure_behavior: min OOF rows/classes unmet or fit raises -> calibration_unavailable
correction_2_beta_calibration.estimator: sklearn.linear_model.LogisticRegression(solver=lbfgs, C=1e6, max_iter=1000, fit_intercept=True) on design [log(clip(p)), -log(clip(1-p))]; a,b = coef_, c = intercept_
correction_2_beta_calibration.monotonicity_policy: not enforced; output clipped to (0,1); if the fitted map is non-monotone the beta variant is still reported as beta (documented), never relabeled
correction_2_beta_calibration.parameters: THREE parameters a, b, c (intercept c IS fitted) - a 3-parameter beta-calibration model

correction_3_unavailable_calibration_inv.invariant: calibration_unavailable == true  =>  promotion_eligible == false AND skill_established == false

correction_4_v1_mapping_audit.finding: event_id IS the MLB game_pk (direct integer identity)
correction_4_v1_mapping_audit.resolution: COMPLETE deterministic mapping -> use PAIRED common-row comparison. NRFI_CORE_V1 (logistic_raw, raw p_yrfi) joined on game_pk==event_id is a PAIRED DIAGNOSTIC comparator. It is NOT the designated promotion baseline (that is expanding_climatology) and does NOT enter the 84-variant multiplicity family.
correction_4_v1_mapping_audit.supersedes: manifest baseline nrfi_core_v1_comparator (which wrongly said V1 is unpairable because predictions omit game_pk)

correction_5_baseline_duplication.finding: within each walk-forward fold, pooled_climatology and expanding_climatology are mathematically IDENTICAL (both = mean(yrfi over training rows season<=train_through))
correction_5_baseline_duplication.policy: the duplicate pooled value MUST NOT be presented as independent evidence; both are reported but treated as one baseline for inference

live_inference.unexpected_category: FAIL the affected feature stage CLOSED

multiplicity_family_unchanged.family: 7 ablations x 3 models x 4 probability treatments

pre_evaluation_status: PREDICTIVE SKILL NOT ESTABLISHED means skill has NOT YET been demonstrated; the V2.2 result is NOT known before execution.
